analysis.doc: Synchronized from Linear issue identifier: POL-303

POL-303.title: IMPLEMENT: Finalize state authority and Linear review-gate lifecycle
POL-303.body:
## Objective

Implement the four-part fix that prevents finalize from using stale/mismatched state and ensures Linear issues are moved to review, not closed, after delivery.

## Context

Produced by analysis run polaris-analyze-finalize-state-authority-2026-06-03-001 on [POL-302](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-302/analyze-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle). During the [POL-296](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-296/implement-wire-cognition-librarian-into-runtime-staged-note-flow-and) run, finalize consumed a stale compatibility state file (run_id: polaris-run-[POL-289](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-289/implement-foremanworker-boundary-hardening-from-pol-283-postmortem)-2026-06-03-001) and generated a PR labeled as [POL-289](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-289/implement-foremanworker-boundary-hardening-from-pol-283-postmortem) while delivering [POL-296](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-296/implement-wire-cognition-librarian-into-runtime-staged-note-flow-and) commits. Five gaps were identified: non-canonical state path accepted, branch custody check bypassed (no delivery_branch on legacy cluster), no run_id/branch/cluster_id cross-validation, delivery integrity gate approving wrong-cluster commits, and no enforced prohibition on Done transitions.

## Goal

After this cluster completes:

* finalize refuses compatibility/legacy state paths as `--state-file` arguments
* finalize aborts when `state.cluster_id` does not match the current branch
* PR title and body include `cluster_id` as the primary identifier
* finalize moves Linear parent issues to In Review (not Done) after delivery, with comment-only fallback when no review state exists
* Role doctrine explicitly prohibits agent-driven Done transitions

## Scope

* src/finalize/\*\*
* src/loop/checkpoint.ts
* .polaris/roles/\*\*

## Acceptance Criteria

* finalize aborts with clear error when --state-file points to compatibility or legacy path
* finalize aborts when cluster_id does not match branch name slug
* PR title format: `polaris finalize: <cluster_id> (<run_id>)`
* Linear parent moved to In Review after finalize; comment-only when no review state exists
* No Polaris code path may transition Linear issues to Done or Closed
* Role doctrine files prohibit Done transitions explicitly
* All new behaviors covered by unit tests

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/finalize src/loop

## Ordering

No dependencies on other IMPLEMENT clusters.

## Non-goals

* Do not change the delivery integrity gate logic beyond what is required for cross-validation
* Do not rewrite the Linear adapter (comment-based approach remains for non-state interactions)
* Do not implement Cognition Librarian integration (tracked by [POL-282](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-282/analyze-audit-cognition-librarian-runtime-integration-and-missing))
* Do not broaden into a generic Linear integration rewrite

POL-282.title: ANALYZE: Audit cognition librarian runtime integration and missing worker note flow

POL-289.title: IMPLEMENT: Foreman/Worker boundary hardening from POL-283 postmortem

POL-296.title: IMPLEMENT: Wire cognition librarian into runtime — staged note flow and foreman dispatch

POL-307.title: IMPLEMENT: Enforce Linear review-gate prohibition in Polaris role doctrine
POL-307.body:
## Objective

Add explicit prohibition against Done/Closed Linear state transitions to the finalizer, worker, and foreman role doctrine files so all agents operating under these roles are bound by the review-gate policy.

## Context

[POL-302](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-302/analyze-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) analysis identified that there is no role-level prohibition preventing agents from marking Linear issues Done. The code-level prohibition implemented in the sibling child ([POL-303](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-303/implement-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) Child 3) covers the finalize path, but the doctrine must also cover agent sessions directly. An agent running in foreman or worker role must know it may never call `issueUpdate` to transition to Done or Closed, regardless of what the implementation code does. This doctrine is enforced at the role level, not the runtime level.

## Goal

After this child is done:

* `.polaris/roles/finalizer.md` (or equivalent) explicitly states: "Finalize may transition issues to In Review at most. It must never transition to Done or Closed."
* `.polaris/roles/worker.md` explicitly states: "Workers must not mark Linear issues Done or Closed. Issue state transitions are limited to In Progress or equivalent active states."
* `.polaris/roles/foreman.md` explicitly states: "Foreman must not mark Linear issues Done or Closed. Only human review may authorize Done."
* Each prohibition includes the rationale (link to [POL-302](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-302/analyze-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) or inline note about human-review authority)

## Scope

* .polaris/roles/\*\*

## Acceptance Criteria

* Each of the three role files contains an explicit prohibition section or bullet covering Done/Closed transitions
* The prohibition references the review-gate policy and states that human review is the only authority for Done
* No existing role prohibitions are removed or weakened
* Role files remain well-formed markdown

## Validation

* npm run build
* grep -r "Done|Closed" .polaris/roles/ (manual review that prohibition language is present)

## Ordering

Depends on the Linear review-gate implementation child ([POL-303](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-303/implement-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) Child 3) being done first, so the doctrine reflects the implemented behavior.

## Non-goals

* Do not change role authority levels or add new roles
* Do not modify POLARIS.md or CLAUDE.md
* Do not implement any runtime enforcement beyond what is in the role files

POL-306.title: IMPLEMENT: Linear review-gate — transition to In Review after finalize, prohibit Done transitions
POL-306.body:
## Objective

Update `stepUpdateLinear` and `postLinearComment` so that finalize attempts to move the parent issue to an In Review state after successful delivery, falling back to comment-only when no review state is available, and explicitly prohibiting Done/Closed transitions in code.

## Context

`src/finalize/steps/11-update-linear.ts` and `src/finalize/linear.ts` currently only call `commentCreate`. This is correct (no unauthorized Done transition) but undocumented and unenforced. The required policy from [POL-302](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-302/analyze-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) is: finalize may move issues to In Review at most; human review is the only authority for Done. See [POL-302](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-302/analyze-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) analysis (section 5) and [POL-303](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-303/implement-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) for full context.

## Goal

After this child is done:

* finalize queries available Linear states for the issue's team
* If a state of type `review` or name matching `In Review`/`Review` is found: call `issueUpdate` to transition the parent to that state
* If no review state is found: post comment only (current behavior), with message noting the missing state
* `postLinearComment` (or a new helper) explicitly documents that it must never call `issueUpdate` with a Done or Closed state
* A code-level guard (assertion or explicit throw) prevents the Done/Closed transition path from being added silently

## Scope

* src/finalize/linear.ts
* src/finalize/steps/11-update-linear.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* When LINEAR_API_KEY is set and a review state is available: `issueUpdate` is called with the review state ID
* When LINEAR_API_KEY is set but no review state exists: only `commentCreate` is called; comment body includes note about missing review state
* No code path in `linear.ts` may call `issueUpdate` with a state ID that corresponds to Done or Closed
* New tests cover: review-state-found path, review-state-not-found path, and the Done-prohibited assertion
* Existing comment-only tests remain passing

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/finalize

## Ordering

None. Independent of other children in this cluster.

## Non-goals

* Do not implement Cognition Librarian post-run integration ([POL-282](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-282/analyze-audit-cognition-librarian-runtime-integration-and-missing))
* Do not change the Linear API key handling or error behavior beyond what is needed
* Do not implement Linear webhook or two-way sync

POL-305.title: IMPLEMENT: Harden finalize PR metadata — cluster_id as primary identifier in title and body
POL-305.body:
## Objective

Change the PR title format so that `cluster_id` is the primary identifier and add pre-creation cross-validation that aborts before `gh pr create` if cluster/branch agreement cannot be confirmed.

## Context

`src/finalize/github.ts:13` currently generates PR titles as `polaris finalize: ${state.run_id}`. When state is stale ([POL-296](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-296/implement-wire-cognition-librarian-into-runtime-staged-note-flow-and) incident), this produces a title referencing the wrong cluster. The fix makes `cluster_id` the primary identifier and adds a cross-validation gate before the gh CLI is called. See [POL-302](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-302/analyze-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) analysis and [POL-303](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-303/implement-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) for full context.

## Goal

After this child is done:

* PR title format is: `polaris finalize: ${state.cluster_id} (${state.run_id})`
* PR body includes a `**Cluster ID:**` row
* `createDraftPr` validates that `state.cluster_id` is non-empty and that `branch` contains the cluster ID slug before calling gh
* If validation fails: throw with a clear message so finalize aborts before any PR is created

## Scope

* src/finalize/github.ts
* src/finalize/finalize.test.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* PR title matches format `polaris finalize: POL-296 (polaris-run-pol-296-2026-06-03-001)` for a normal run
* PR body contains `**Cluster ID:** POL-296`
* `createDraftPr` throws if `state.cluster_id` is empty
* `createDraftPr` throws if branch does not contain the cluster ID slug
* Existing finalize tests updated to reflect new title format
* New tests cover the two new throw conditions

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/finalize

## Ordering

None. Independent of other children in this cluster.

## Non-goals

* Do not change the PR draft/non-draft logic
* Do not change the gh CLI invocation beyond title/body and the new pre-call check
* Do not modify Linear update logic (that is Child 3)

POL-304.title: IMPLEMENT: Add finalize state-file authority gate and branch/cluster cross-validation preflight
POL-304.body:
## Objective

Add three preflight checks to finalize that reject non-canonical state paths and abort on branch/cluster_id/state.branch mismatch.

## Context

During the [POL-296](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-296/implement-wire-cognition-librarian-into-runtime-staged-note-flow-and) incident, finalize was invoked with `--state-file .taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json`. That path is classified as "compatibility/debug" in `src/loop/status.ts:147` and must never drive delivery. Additionally, finalize has no check that `state.cluster_id` matches the current git branch, and no check that `state.branch` (when populated) matches the current branch. All three gaps allowed [POL-289](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-289/implement-foremanworker-boundary-hardening-from-pol-283-postmortem) state to finalize a [POL-296](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-296/implement-wire-cognition-librarian-into-runtime-staged-note-flow-and) delivery. See [POL-302](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-302/analyze-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) analysis and [POL-303](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-303/implement-finalize-state-authority-and-linear-review-gate-lifecycle) for full context.

## Goal

After this child is done:

* finalize aborts when `--state-file` points to `.taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json` or `.polaris/runs/current-state.json`
* finalize aborts when `state.cluster_id` does not contain a slug matching the current branch name (case-insensitive, hyphen-normalized)
* finalize aborts when `state.branch` is non-empty and differs from the current git branch
* All three aborts emit a clear, actionable error message

## Scope

* src/finalize/index.ts
* src/finalize/finalize.test.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* `finalize run --state-file .taskchain_artifacts/polaris-run/current-state.json` exits non-zero with message referencing "compatibility" path
* `finalize run --state-file .polaris/runs/current-state.json` exits non-zero with message referencing "legacy" path
* finalize on branch `pol-296-delivery` with `state.cluster_id = "POL-289"` aborts with cluster mismatch message
* finalize with `state.branch = "pol-296-delivery"` while on branch `pol-302-fix` aborts with branch mismatch message
* finalize with a canonical state path, matching cluster_id, and matching state.branch proceeds normally
* New preflight checks execute before the existing Step 4 (run checks)

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/finalize

## Ordering

None. This child has no dependencies.

## Non-goals

* Do not change the delivery integrity gate or branch custody check logic
* Do not add a `--allow-legacy-state` override flag in this child (defer to follow-up if needed)
* Do not modify any files outside src/finalize/

POL-302.title: ANALYZE: Finalize state authority and Linear review-gate lifecycle
